title: Record: WD + FP16 Embed + Warmdown (val_bpb=TBD)
author: magungh1
body:
## Summary

Three small, low-risk improvements to the baseline (no architectural changes):

- **Weight decay (0.01)** on token embedding and scalar optimizers (Adam → AdamW) — regularizes weights, improves quantization robustness
- **FP16 embedding passthrough** in int8 quantization — keeps the tied embedding in FP16 instead of int8, avoiding compounding errors through dual-use input/output path
- **Warmdown 1200 → 2500** — smoother weight distributions reduce post-quantization BPB penalty

## Expected impact

| Change | Estimated BPB improvement |
|--------|--------------------------|
| Weight decay 0.01 | ~0.002-0.005 |
| FP16 embedding passthrough | ~0.005-0.007 |
| Warmdown 1200→2500 | ~0.001-0.003 |
| **Combined** | **~0.008-0.015** |

## Test plan

- [ ] Train on 8xH100 (RunPod) and collect val_bpb scores
- [ ] Verify model_int8_zlib.pt < 16MB
- [ ] Update PR title with actual val_bpb score
- [ ] Include training logs
